title: Oracle Q3 FY2026: Cloud Revenue Up 44%, AI Infrastructure Up 243%
summary: Oracle reported Q3 FY2026 results: total revenue $17.2B (+22% YoY), cloud revenue $8.9B (+44%). AI infrastructure revenue surged 243%. Remaining performance obligations reached a record $553B (+325%), confirming Oracle's strategic commitment to AI and cloud infrastructure. Over 1,000 AI agents are now running inside Oracle Fusion suite.

title: APEX World 2026: Premier Developer Conference in the Netherlands
summary: APEX World 2026 takes place March 24–25 in the Netherlands — the largest European conference for APEX and PL/SQL developers. Topics include APEXlang, AI integration in APEX 26.1, and hands-on workshops for building enterprise apps. Also announced: KScope 26 (June 14–18, Aurora, Colorado) — the largest US-based APEX conference.

title: APEX Connect 2026: Conference Focused on AI and APEXlang
summary: The annual APEX Connect conference takes place May 18–20 at Heide Park Soltau, Germany. The keynote — "Low-code with APEX 2026 — The State of Play" — covers APEX combined with AI, the new APEXlang language, enhancements for Interactive Reports, Map Regions, Dynamic Actions, REST integration, and PL/SQL APIs.

title: Oracle APEX AI Day: Events Across 10 Countries with APEX 26.1 Preview
summary: Oracle is running a series of APEX AI Day events across 10 countries — the next one on March 26 in Colombo, Sri Lanka. Attendees get early access to APEX 26.1 capabilities: AI tools, natural-language Interactive Reports, the new Universal Theme, and hands-on labs led by the Oracle APEX development team.
